notes: The current platform has one physical Hetzner host, so guest- or software-level warm standbys can be implemented but cross-host active redundancy cannot.
Any future R3 declaration remains a design target until a second failure domain exists and live apply is allowed to converge both domains.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore or rebuild monitoring-lv3 when Alertmanager or the guest cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Replay the monitoring stack converge on monitoring-lv3 after the restored guest is healthy.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when the API gateway container, config, or shared runtime data cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the API gateway converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore backup-lv3 from the off-site Proxmox copy when the local PBS VM or datastore is lost or corrupted.
standby.failback_method: Bring backup-lv3 back from the off-site copy, confirm the datastore, then resume scheduled Proxmox backups.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore or rebuild nginx-lv3 when the published static portal or its edge files cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore nginx-lv3, regenerate the portal, and replay edge publication from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-build-lv3 when the build worker guest or its persistent workspace cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-build-lv3, then rerun the documented build-host converge and cache warm-up.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when the runtime VM or its shared service state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then replay the required service converges from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore coolify-lv3 when the Coolify control plane or its managed runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild coolify-lv3, then rerun the Coolify converge and smoke deployment verification from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore coolify-lv3 when the shared Coolify applications ingress or its managed proxy state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild coolify-lv3, then rerun the Coolify converge and repo-backed smoke deployment verification from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore or rebuild nginx-lv3 when the published docs files or edge publication cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore nginx-lv3, regenerate the docs portal, and replay edge publication from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Dozzle or the shared runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Dozzle converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when the Gitea runtime or its persistent state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Gitea converge and runner reconnect workflow.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore or rebuild monitoring-lv3 when Grafana or the monitoring guest cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Replay the monitoring stack converge on monitoring-lv3 after the restored guest is healthy.

standby.failover_trigger: No cold or warm standby exists; rebuild the host-local service from git and backups after host recovery.
standby.failback_method: Reapply the host-local Headscale automation on the rebuilt primary host.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Homepage or the shared runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Homepage converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Keycloak or its dependent runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Keycloak converge and identity verification flow.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Langfuse or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Langfuse converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when the mail platform or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the mail-platform converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Mattermost or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Mattermost converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when n8n or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the n8n converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when NetBox or its persistent state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the NetBox converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore or rebuild nginx-lv3 when edge publication cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore nginx-lv3 and replay the ingress and edge-publication converges from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when ntfy or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the ntfy converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: No cold or warm standby exists; rebuild the host-local ntopng service after host recovery.
standby.failback_method: Reapply the host-local ntopng automation on the rebuilt primary host.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Ollama or its model-serving state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Ollama converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Open WebUI or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Open WebUI converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when OpenBao or its sealed runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the OpenBao converge and unseal workflow from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when the ops portal runtime cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then regenerate and redeploy the ops portal from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when the platform context API or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the platform-context converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Portainer or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Portainer converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Promote postgres-replica-lv3 through the documented Patroni failover path when postgres-lv3 or the current leader becomes unavailable.
standby.failback_method: Rebuild the old primary as a replica, let it resync, and only then move the writable VIP back if a planned failback is required.

standby.failover_trigger: No cold or warm standby exists; restore host access after host recovery and Proxmox reinstall.
standby.failback_method: Reapply the host bootstrap and Proxmox access automation on the rebuilt primary host.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when SearXNG or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the SearXNG converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Semaphore or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Semaphore converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when the status page runtime cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the status-page converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when step-ca or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the step-ca converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Uptime Kuma or its runtime state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Uptime Kuma converge from git.

standby.failover_trigger: Restore docker-runtime-lv3 when Vaultwarden or its persistent state cannot be recovered in place.
standby.failback_method: Restore or rebuild docker-runtime-lv3, then rerun the Vaultwarden converge from git.
